description: Fix case sensitivity in string comparison
goal: Fix FindUser to do case-insensitive username search
expected_behavior: FindUser should match usernames regardless of case
hints: Convert both the search term and stored keys to the same case using $ZCONVERT(str, 'U')
Iterate with $ORDER: Set key='' then For { Set key=$ORDER(users(key)) Quit:key=""  ...}
IMPORTANT: Postfix Quit must have NO spaces: Quit:key="" not Quit:key = ""
Use Return inside the loop body to return from the method
